channel.title: DevInsights - Engineering Knowledge That Ships
channel.description: Real-world engineering insights for developers building at scale

item.title: Zuul Moments: A Journey Through Dynamic Prompt Routing for Real-Time Analytics
item.description: A story-driven journey from Netflix's Zuul to building a modular, real-time prompt-routing microservice—dynamic, safe, and testable.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Two-Phase Compression: How Uber Tamed a Log Mountain Without Breaking the Bank
item.description: Uber reduced logging costs with two-phase compression, enabling long-term log retention without sacrificing searchability. Learn the approach for multi-format logs.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Startup Drama in a Pod: Uber, Ray, and the Init‑Container Revelation
item.description: Story-driven exploration of Kubernetes init containers vs sidecars, anchored in Uber’s Ray on Kubernetes journey; practical guidance for reliable distributed startup.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Two-Stage Docker Odyssey: Netflix, Python, and the Lean Runtime
item.description: Real-world case study: Netflix’s two-stage Dockerfile guides lean, secure Python apps with C extensions; learn to implement multi-stage builds, non-root runtimes, and health checks.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Edge at Scale: On-Device Fraud Detection for Cross-Platform Payments
item.description: Story-driven blueprint for on-device fraud detection across devices, blending privacy, explainability, and drift handling at scale.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: From LinkedIn's Embedding Store to Real-Time Job Ranking: A Developer's Journey
item.description: Story-driven guide to building a real-time ML ranking pipeline inspired by LinkedIn's embedding store, with data streams, feature store, listwise loss, and phased rollout.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Drift, Gates, and Cross-Account Terraform: A Real-World Journey
item.description: Real-world approach to cross-account Terraform: aliases, module boundaries, OPA policy gates, and drift checks across accounts.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Guardrails for Cloud Sandboxes: A Journey to Policy-Driven, Multi-Cloud Isolation
item.description: Real-world tale of policy-as-code governance for multi-cloud Terraform deployments; hook, journey, and concrete patterns to gate plans before production.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: The Kernel, the Firewall, and the Command Line: A DevOps Journey Through Linux Mastery
item.description: A story-driven guide to essential Linux commands for DevOps, inspired by Automattic's Linux performance regression, with practical, actionable insights.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: 10 Minutes to Clarity: Uber’s Open-Source Backbone and the Quest for Per-Tenant Error Counts
item.description: A narrative-driven look at Uber’s observability journey and a practical streaming approach to count per-tenant errors from rotating logs, with real-world backends and best practices.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: A Cloud-First Odyssey: How to Evaluate Cloud Services with TCO, SLA, and Migration Tactics
item.description: A narrative-driven guide to evaluating cloud services using TCO, SLA metrics, and migration strategies, anchored by Capital One's cloud journey.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: When a Bank Bets on Serverless: Capital One's Leap from Monoliths to Event-Driven Velocity
item.description: Explore Capital One's serverless-first journey and learn how event-driven compute can accelerate software delivery while keeping governance and security intact.
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: API Rate Limiting: Protect Your Services from DDoS
item.description: API Rate Limiting: Protect Your Services from DDoS
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Database Types Compared: Choose the Right One
item.description: Database Types Compared: Choose the Right One
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Kubernetes Ambient Mesh: Future of Service Mesh
item.description: Kubernetes Ambient Mesh: Future of Service Mesh
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Legacy vs Ambient Service Mesh: Which Wins?
item.description: Legacy vs Ambient Service Mesh: Which Wins?
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Mastering API Rate Limiting and Throttling: Practical Patterns for Resilient APIs
item.description: Mastering API Rate Limiting and Throttling: Practical Patterns for Resilient APIs
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: GraphQL vs REST API Design: A Practical Guide for Modern Web APIs
item.description: GraphQL vs REST API Design: A Practical Guide for Modern Web APIs
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Mastering Self-Healing Systems in Distributed Architectures
item.description: Mastering Self-Healing Systems in Distributed Architectures
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule

item.title: Cloud Service Models on the Road to Global Scale: An Airbnb-Inspired Journey
item.description: Cloud Service Models on the Road to Global Scale: An Airbnb-Inspired Journey
item.author: Satishkumar Dhule
